testcase.name: test_doula_login

failure.message: AssertionError: No access_token in response assert 'access_token' in {'email': 'demo.doula@truejoybirthing.com', 'full_name': 'Sarah Mitchell', 'onboarding_completed': True, 'picture': 'https://example.com/test-picture.jpg', ...}

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_uiux_fixes_iteration112.py:44: in test_doula_login assert "access_token" in data, "No access_token in response" E AssertionError: No access_token in response E assert 'access_token' in {'email': 'demo.doula@truejoybirthing.com', 'full_name': 'Sarah Mitchell', 'onboarding_completed': True, 'picture': 'https://example.com/test-picture.jpg', ...}

testcase.name: test_midwife_login

failure.message: AssertionError: No access_token in response assert 'access_token' in {'email': 'demo.midwife@truejoybirthing.com', 'full_name': 'Emily Thompson', 'onboarding_completed': True, 'picture': 'https://api.dicebear.com/7.x/lorelei/png?seed=Emily Thompson&size=200', ...}

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_uiux_fixes_iteration112.py:53: in test_midwife_login assert "access_token" in data, "No access_token in response" E AssertionError: No access_token in response E assert 'access_token' in {'email': 'demo.midwife@truejoybirthing.com', 'full_name': 'Emily Thompson', 'onboarding_completed': True, 'picture': 'https://api.dicebear.com/7.x/lorelei/png?seed=Emily Thompson&size=200', ...}
